data.title: In 2026, Ethereum to undergo Glamsterdam and Hegota forks, L1 scaling, 10% network adoption of ZK, gas limit hike and more.
data.description: In the upcoming year, significant advancements are expected in the Ethereum network. Perfect parallel processing is anticipated along with notable increases in the gas limit and the number of data blobs. Additionally, it is projected that around 10% of Ethereum's network will transition to ZK technology.

data.title: Walnut Coding introduces AI-powered coding hardware for kids at 2025 World Internet Conference in China.
data.description: On December 25, 2025, in Beijing, Walnut Coding, a prominent online platform for teaching coding to children, introduced its newest AI-driven coding device at the 2025 World Internet Conference in Wuzhen, China. The event took place from November 6 to 9 and drew attention to the company's innovative technology.

data.title: Crypto derivatives trading hits $86T in '25, averaging $265B daily; Binance dominates with 30% share: CoinGlass.
data.description: In 2025, the trading volume for cryptocurrency derivatives skyrocketed to $86 trillion. This translates to an average daily trading volume of $265 billion. Binance, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange, dominated the market by capturing nearly 30% of the global trading volume. The data was reported by CoinGlass, a leading cryptocurrency analytics platform.
